allow: Bash(time bundle exec rake test parallel:*)

Bash(__NEW_LINE__ bundle exec ruby -e '
require ""bundler/setup""
require ""yard-lint""

files = Dir.glob(""lib/**/*.rb"")
result = Yard::Lint.run(path: files, progress: false)
invalid_types = result.offenses.select { |o| o[:name] == ""InvalidTagType"" }
invalid_types.first(5).each do |o|
  puts ""#{o[:location]}:#{o[:location_line]} - #{o[:method_name]}""
end
puts ""... (#{invalid_types.size} total)""
')

Bash(__NEW_LINE__ bundle exec ruby -e '
require ""bundler/setup""
require ""yard-lint""
files = Dir.glob(""lib/**/*.rb"")
result = Yard::Lint.run(path: files, progress: false)
result.offenses.select { |o| o[:name] == ""InvalidTagType"" }.each do |o|
  puts ""#{o[:location]}:#{o[:location_line]} - #{o[:method_name]}""
end
')
Bash(__NEW_LINE__ echo "=== Running yard-lint on itself ===")

Bash(test_boolean.rb <<'EOF'
# Test class
class TestClass
  # Method without return
  def enabled?
    true
  end
end
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test-comprehensive-config.yml <<'EOF'
# Test comprehensive config with all possible patterns
AllValidators:
  YardOptions:
    - --private
    - --protected
  Exclude:
    - vendor/**/*
    - node_modules/**/*
  FailOnSeverity: warning
  MinCoverage: 80.0
  DiffMode:
    DefaultBaseRef: main
    IncludeUntracked: false
  # Users might add custom keys
  CustomKey: custom_value
  Severity: convention

# Inherit patterns
inherit_from:
  - .base-config.yml

inherit_gem:
  my_gem: .yard-lint.yml

# Category-level configs
Documentation:
  Enabled: true
  Severity: error

Tags:
  Enabled: true

# Full validator configs with all possible keys
Documentation/UndocumentedObjects:
  Description: 'Custom description'
  StyleGuide: 'https://example.com/style'
  VersionAdded: '1.0.0'
  VersionChanged: '1.5.0'
  Enabled: true
  Severity: error
  Exclude:
    - lib/legacy/**/*
  YardOptions:
    - --private
  ExcludedMethods:
    - initialize/0
    - /^_/

Tags/Order:
  Enabled: true
  Severity: convention
  EnforcedOrder:
    - param
    - return

Tags/RedundantParamDescription:
  Enabled: true
  Articles:
    - The
    - the
  MaxRedundantWords: 6
  GenericTerms:
    - object
    - value
  EnabledPatterns:
    ArticleParam: true
    TypeRestatement: true

Tags/ExampleStyle:
  Enabled: true
  Linter: auto
  SkipPatterns:
    - '/skip-lint/i'
EOF)

Bash(/tmp/test-validator-options.yml <<'EOF'
Tags/RedundantParamDescription:
  Articles:
    - The
  MaxRedundantWords: 6
  GenericTerms:
    - object
  EnabledPatterns:
    ArticleParam: true

Tags/ExampleStyle:
  Linter: auto
  SkipPatterns:
    - '/skip/'

Tags/InformalNotation:
  CaseSensitive: false
  RequireStartOfLine: true
  Patterns:
    Note: '@note'

Documentation/BlankLineBeforeDefinition:
  OrphanedSeverity: error
  EnabledPatterns:
    SingleBlankLine: true
    OrphanedDocs: true

Tags/CollectionType:
  EnforcedStyle: long
  ValidatedTags:
    - param

Tags/ApiTags:
  AllowedApis:
    - public

Tags/ForbiddenTags:
  ForbiddenPatterns:
    - Tag: return
      Types: [void]

Tags/TagGroupSeparator:
  TagGroups:
    param: [param]
  RequireAfterDescription: false

Documentation/MissingReturn:
  ExcludedMethods:
    - initialize
EOF)
Bash(for f in test/**/*_test.rb; do ruby -c "$f" 2>&1 | grep -v "^Syntax OK" && echo "  -> $f"; done 2>&1 | head -60)
Bash(for f in test/**/*_test.rb; do if ! ruby -c "$f" 2>/dev/null > /dev/null; then echo "=== $f ==="; ruby -c "$f" 2>&1 | head -3; echo; fi; done)

Bash(for f in \\
  /home/mencio/Software/Mensfeld/yard-lint/test/yard/lint/validators/documentation/blank_line_before_definition/messages_builder_test.rb \\
  /home/mencio/Software/Mensfeld/yard-lint/test/yard/lint/validators/tags/tag_type_position/parser_test.rb \\
  /home/mencio/Software/Mensfeld/yard-lint/test/yard/lint/validators/tags/collection_type/parser_test.rb \\
  /home/mencio/Software/Mensfeld/yard-lint/test/yard/lint/result_builder_test.rb \\
  /home/mencio/Software/Mensfeld/yard-lint/test/yard/lint/results/base_test.rb; do
  echo "=== $f ==="
  ruby -c "$f" 2>&1 | head -5
  echo
done)
Bash(for f in test/**/*_test.rb; do ruby -Itest -r test_helper -c "$f" 2>&1 | grep -v "Syntax OK" && echo "  -> $f"; done 2>&1 | grep -B1 'Error\\|uninitialized' | head -40)

Bash(git ls-tree -r 602836c --name-only -- spec/ | grep '_spec\\.rb$' | while read f; do echo "=== $f ==="; git show 602836c:$f | grep -n '^\\s*\\\(describe\\|context\\|it\\\) '; done 2>/dev/null | tail -n +501 | head -500)

Bash(git diff --name-only | while read f; do
  if git diff "$f" | grep -q '^-$' 2>/dev/null; then
    echo "$f"
  fi
done)
Bash(TESTOPTS='-r test_helper' bundle exec parallel_test -n 2 test/ 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(RUBYOPT='-Itest -r test_helper' bundle exec parallel_test -n 2 test/ 2>&1 | grep -E "error|failure|Error" | head -20)
Bash(bundle exec parallel_test -n 2 --exec-args 'bundle exec ruby -Itest -r test_helper' test/ 2>&1 | head -30)
Bash(rubyopt="${RUBYOPT:-} -Itest" bundle exec parallel_test -n 2 test/ 2>&1 | tail -10)
Bash(RUBYOPT="${RUBYOPT:-} -Itest" bundle exec parallel_test -n 2 test/ 2>&1 | head -15)
Bash(bundle exec ruby -e "require 'parallel_tests'; puts parallel_tests::VERSION" 2>/dev/null; gem contents parallel_tests 2>/dev/null | head -30)
Bash(PARALLEL_TESTS_EXECUTABLE='ruby -Itest -r test_helper' bundle exec parallel_test -n 8 --verbose-process-command test/ 2>&1 | head -20)
Bash(PARALLEL_TESTS_EXECUTABLE='ruby -Itest -r test_helper' bundle exec parallel_test -n 8 test/ 2>&1)
